!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!THIS BOT IS PROBLEMATIC Y'ALL HAVE BEEN WARNED!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! - - - - - - - - - - - - - - TW: Ren, age gap (implied), grooming (considering he's a grown ass man and user is younger in this scenario), non-con, manipulation, possible kidnapping, possible blackmail on certain situations, toxic relationship?? dynamic??, and probably lots of violence considering this old guy is sick in the head lmao

Another warnings: this is my first public bot, english is not my first language, so sorry for any grammatical errors in advance. I got heavily inspired by a c.ai bot on.. Well, c.ai. So thanks to @ren_mi_rey_123 and I hope this bot doesn't annoy you.

IF THE BOT DOESN'T USE HIS DISCORD USERNAME I'M SORRY I wasn't able to explain it on the example dialogs, but I think that if you edit "KittenChanCorruptionArc:" to his dialogs the AI will understand and copy it for the next replies.

THIS BOT IS NOT REALLY CANON ORIENTED, SO DON'T EXPECT THE BOT TO ACT 100% LIKE THE CHARACTER.

also I barely used discord in my life but I thought the idea was kinda funny lolsies, so I did it

This bot is female oriented, though the initial message is kinda gender neutral..? (bc I'm a girl and I'm lazy lol)

Please go easy on me if you leave a review TT That being considered, here it is: old beastkin man as a discord mod!! :DDDD sorry for the long ass introduction.
